name: Rapid Fire
tip: Within half range, makes $1 additional attack(s) when shooting.

name: Sustained Hits
tip: Each Critical Hit scores $1 extra hit(s).

name: Melta
tip: Within half range, add $1 to the Damage characteristic.

name: Anti-keyword
tip: Against $1 units, a Critical Wound is scored on an unmodified Wound roll of $2+.

name: Devastating Wounds
tip: A Critical Wound inflicts mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic. The attack sequence ends — no saving throw is made.

name: Lethal Hits
tip: Each Critical Hit automatically wounds the target — no Wound roll is made.

name: Twin-linked
tip: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

name: Indirect Fire
tip: Can target units not visible to the bearer, but those attacks suffer −1 to the Hit roll.

name: Ignores Cover
tip: The target cannot use Cover to improve its saving throw against attacks with this weapon.

name: Torrent
tip: This weapon automatically hits its target — no Hit roll is made.

name: Heavy
tip: Add 1 to the Hit roll if the bearer's unit Remained Stationary this phase.

name: Blast
tip: Add 1 attack for every 5 models in the target unit (before any dice are rolled).

name: Hazardous
tip: After firing, roll one D6: on a 1, the bearer's unit suffers 1 mortal wound (D3 if the bearer is a Vehicle or Monster).

name: Pistol
tip: The bearer can make attacks with this weapon even while its unit is within Engagement Range of an enemy.

name: Assault
tip: The bearer can still shoot with this weapon after making an Advance move this phase.

name: Lance
tip: Add 1 to the Wound roll if the bearer made a Charge move this phase.

name: Precision
tip: When an attack wounds an Attached unit, you can bypass Look Out, Sir and allocate the attack to any model in that unit.

name: Psychic
tip: Invulnerable saving throws cannot be made against attacks with this weapon.
